expectations.text: Phase 0: uuidgen으로 short-id 생성 및 state directory 생성
expectations.evidence: No structured phase system. Agent went directly to codebase exploration.
No team creation or sub-agent spawning. Single agent investigation.

expectations.text: Phase 0.5: seed-analysis.json에 severity, status, dimensions, research 필드 모두 포함
expectations.evidence: No seed-analysis.json created. Findings embedded in execution trace markdown.

expectations.text: Phase 0.55: perspective-generator가 seed-analysis.json을 읽고 dimensions.complexity로 perspective 수 결정
expectations.evidence: No perspective generation phase. No complexity-based scaling.

expectations.text: Phase 0.55: perspectives.json의 각 perspective에 id, name, scope, key_questions, model, agent_type, rationale 필드 존재
Phase 0.55: perspectives.json에 rules_applied 필드가 있고 core_archetype_included=true
Phase 0.6: AskUserQuestion으로 perspective 승인 요청 후 perspectives.json에 approved=true 추가
expectations.evidence: No user approval step for analysis perspectives.

expectations.text: Phase 0.7: ontology scope mapping 실행 (prism_docs_roots 호출 시도)
expectations.evidence: No ontology scope mapping. Agent used Grep/Read directly.

expectations.text: Phase 0.8: context.json에 research_summary가 seed-analysis.json의 research 데이터를 반영
Phase 1: perspectives.json의 각 perspective.model과 agent_type이 spawn 파라미터에 그대로 사용됨
expectations.evidence: No multi-agent spawn. Single agent investigation.

expectations.text: Phase 1: analyst 프롬프트에 context.json의 summary가 {CONTEXT}로, ontology-scope.json이 {ONTOLOGY_SCOPE}로 주입됨
Phase 1: 분석가가 finding-protocol.md 기반으로 spawn (verification-protocol 아님)
Phase 1: 각 analyst가 perspectives/{perspective-id}/findings.json에 analyst, findings[] 필드 작성
Phase 2A: finding 분석가 shutdown 후 TaskOutput으로 drain
Phase 2B: verifier가 findings.json을 읽은 후 prism_interview 실행
expectations.evidence: No Socratic verification. No prism_interview used.

expectations.text: Phase 2B: analyst-findings.md에 모든 perspective의 검증 결과 통합
Phase 3: report.md 템플릿의 모든 섹션이 analyst-findings.md 기반으로 채워짐
expectations.evidence: No template-based report. Free-form markdown output with self-evaluation section.
